field_values.action_summary: A frantic chase ensues through the deserted streets of the Martian city. The protagonist uses his superior jumping ability to navigate the urban landscape, attempting to stay ahead of the relentless Watch Dog.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide sweeping shots of Martian architecture; Dynamic tracking shots (gimbal or drone) following the chase; POV shots from the protagonist jumping between structures
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Precise height and distance measurements for all jumps
Timing of the_watch_dog arrival at street corners relative to protagonist position
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH005_SC003

## Production Intent
Execute a high-velocity pursuit through martian_city_streets to demonstrate protagonist agility and escalate tension via relentless pursuit.

## Required Cast
- protagonist
- the_watch_dog

## Required Environments
- martian_city_streets
- building rooftops/ledges

## Continuity Constraints
- Precise height and distance measurements for all jumps
- Timing of the_watch_dog arrival at street corners relative to protagonist position

## Beat List
- BT001: Initial sprint through streets
- BT002: Vertical navigation jump
- BT003: Cornered desperation
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
